audit: DUNGEON.DAT All Data Structures Source-Lock Verification
target: DM1 PC 3.4 — ALL DUNGEON.DAT data structures

categories.name: Dungeon File Header

redmcsb_evidence.citation: COMPRESSED_DUNGEON_HEADER: Signature(0x8104), DecompressedByteCount(long), DungeonID(uint16); DUNGEON_HEADER: OrnamentRandomSeed, RawMapDataByteCount, MapCount, TextDataWordCount, InitialPartyLocation, SquareFirstThingCount, ThingCount[16]
DUNGEON_HEADER* G0278_ps_DungeonHeader; G0278_ps_DungeonHeader->MapCount accessed for map iteration
G0525_l_GameID, G0526_ui_DungeonID, G0527_i_Platform, G0528_i_Format — file format identity metadata

categories.notes: PC 3.4 little-endian. Decompressor reads GameID(4), DungeonID(2), Platform(2), Format(2), level_count(2), total_size(4) — matches COMPRESSED_DUNGEON_HEADER at DEFS.H:984. File-level magic/signature = 0x8104 (compressed). DUNGEON_HEADER follows after decompression.

categories.name: Map Metadata (per map)

redmcsb_evidence.citation: MAP struct: A.Width(+1), A.Height(+1), A.Level; B.WallOrnamentCount, B.RandomWallOrnamentCount, B.FloorOrnamentCount, B.RandomFloorOrnamentCount; C.DoorOrnamentCount, C.CreatureTypeCount, C.Difficulty; D.FloorSet, D.WallSet, D.DoorSet0, D.DoorSet1

G0273_i_CurrentMapWidth = G0269_ps_CurrentMap->A.Width + 1; G0274_i_CurrentMapHeight = G0269_ps_CurrentMap->A.Height + 1; G0275_as_CurrentMapDoorInfo[0] = G0254_as_Graphic559_DoorInfo[G0269_ps_CurrentMap->D.DoorSet0]
G0269_ps_CurrentMap->B.WallOrnamentCount, G0269_ps_CurrentMap->B.FloorOrnamentCount, G0269_ps_CurrentMap->C.DoorOrnamentCount, G0269_ps_CurrentMap->C.CreatureTypeCount

categories.notes: Per-map metadata struct confirmed. Level dimensions encoded as (Width+1, Height+1). Map type (normal/party/treasure/goal/special) encoded by InitialPartyLocation in DUNGEON_HEADER. Light level derived from map difficulty/floor set. Music index not present in DM1 PC 3.4 maps.

categories.name: Cell/Wall Data

redmcsb_evidence.citation: F0151_DUNGEON_GetSquare(int16_t P0262_i_MapX, int16_t P0263_i_MapY) — returns unsigned char raw square cell byte
MASK0x0001_WALL_WEST_RANDOM_ORNAMENT_ALLOWED, MASK0x0002_WALL_SOUTH, MASK0x0004_WALL_EAST, MASK0x0008_WALL_NORTH, MASK0x0010_THING_LIST_PRESENT; also PIT, STAIRS, DOOR, TELEPORTER, FAKEWALL masks
Square bitmap per cell: N/S/E/W wall ornament allowance via bitmasks; thing list pointer at MASK0x0010

categories.notes: Per-cell raw byte encodes: square type (C00-C06 elements via M034_SQUARE_TYPE), N/S/E/W wall ornament allowance (bits 0-3), thing list present flag (bit 4). Wall bitmap indices for texture lookup derived from N/S/E/W orientation.

categories.name: Floor/Square Data

redmcsb_evidence.citation: P0317_pui_SquareAspect[C0_ELEMENT] = M034_SQUARE_TYPE(AL0307_uc_Square) — square type extraction from raw cell byte
C00_ELEMENT_WALL, C01_ELEMENT_CORRIDOR, C02_ELEMENT_PIT, C03_ELEMENT_STAIRS, C04_ELEMENT_DOOR, C05_ELEMENT_TELEPORTER, C06_ELEMENT_FAKEWALL
F0170_DUNGEON_GetRandomOrnamentOrdinal for floor ornaments; G0269_ps_CurrentMap->B.RandomFloorOrnamentCount
MASK0x0001_PIT_IMAGINARY, MASK0x0004_PIT_INVISIBLE, MASK0x0008_PIT_OPEN; MASK0x0008_STAIRS_NORTH_SOUTH_ORIENTATION; MASK0x0004_FAKEWALL_OPEN, MASK0x0008_FAKEWALL_RANDOM_ORNAMENT_OR_FOOTPRINTS_ALLOWED

categories.notes: Per-square floor type extracted via M034_SQUARE_TYPE from raw cell byte. Pit type (open/invisible/imaginary) via three bit masks. Stairs destination via F0154/F0155. Floor ornament ordinal via F0170 seeded from OrnamentRandomSeed + coordinates.

categories.name: Sensor Data (C000-C127)

redmcsb_evidence.citation: SENSOR union: Remote struct (Next, Type_Data, OnceOnly, Effect, RevertEffect, Audible, Value, LocalEffect, OrnamentOrdinal, TargetCell, TargetMapX, TargetMapY) and Local struct (Next, Type_Data, Multiple for group generators). M039_TYPE(sensor) extracts type (0-127), M040_DATA(sensor) shifts >> 7.
Sensor type constants: C000_SENSOR_DISABLED(0), C001-C005 floor, C006_GROUP_GENERATOR(6), C007-C009 floor; C001-C018 wall sensors; C127_WALL_CHAMPION_PORTRAIT(127)
F0268_SENSOR_AddEvent (line 1000); F0272_SENSOR_TriggerEffect (line 1152): reads Remote.OnceOnly, Remote.Value, Remote.LocalEffect, Remote.TargetMapX/Y, Remote.TargetCell
F0276_SENSOR_ProcessThingAdditionOrRemoval: triggers floor sensors C001-C005, C007-C009 based on thing type
F0275_SENSOR_IsTriggeredByClickOnWall: triggers wall sensors C001-C004, C011-C013, C016-C017, C127

categories.notes: All 20 sensor types defined. Sensor data field per type: floor sensors (C001-C005, C007-C009) use Remote.Data (M040_DATA>>7); C006 uses Local.Multiple (bits 0-3=HM, bits 4-10=count); wall click sensors use Remote.RevertEffect/Effect; wall event sensors use Remote.Value(tick delay); C127 uses M040_DATA for portrait ordinal.

categories.name: Actuator/Trigger Data

redmcsb_evidence.citation: F0241_TIMELINE_ProcessEvent1_DoorAnimation: door animation timeline handler
F0242_TIMELINE_ProcessEvent7_Square_FakeWall: fake wall toggle
F0243_TIMELINE_ProcessEvent2_DoorDestruction: door destruction event
F0244_TIMELINE_ProcessEvent10_Square_Door: square door state change
F0245_TIMELINE_ProcessEvent5_Square_Corridor: corridor (generator) event — processes C006_SENSOR_FLOOR_GROUP_GENERATOR
F0246_TIMELINE_ProcessEvent65_EnableGroupGenerator: re-enables disabled generator sensors
F0247_TIMELINE_TriggerProjectileLauncher: projectile launcher actuators (C007-C010, C014-C015)
F0248_TIMELINE_ProcessEvent6_Square_Wall: wall event processor (C005 AND/GATE, C006 countdown, C007-C010 launchers, C014-C015 square launchers, C018 end game)

categories.notes: Actuator state machine driven by TIMELINE event queue. Door actuators via F0241/F0244. Button/pressure plate handled as sensors that trigger timeline events. No separate actuator record — actuators are sensors producing timeline events. State transitions in F0241-F0248 handlers.

categories.name: Object Records

redmcsb_evidence.citation: G0235_auc_Graphic559_ThingDataByteCount[16]: Door=4, Teleporter=6, TextString=4, Sensor=8, Group=16, Weapon=4, Armour=4, Scroll=4, Potion=4, Container=8, Junk=4, Projectile=8, Explosion=4
G0237_as_Graphic559_ObjectInfo[180]: object type table {Type, ObjectAspectIndex, ActionSetIndex, AllowedSlots}
F0156_DUNGEON_GetThingData(P0284_T_Thing): returns pointer to thing data bytes; F0032_OBJECT_GetType for object type extraction from thing
OBJECT_INFO typedef: {int16_t Type, ObjectAspectIndex, ActionSetIndex, AllowedSlots}

categories.notes: Object type stored in thing type field. Position via square first-thing linked list (F0161_DUNGEON_GetSquareFirstThing). Orientation per object type in OBJECT_INFO. Object attributes (charges, enchantment, named) in object-specific bytes after fixed header.

categories.name: Creature Generator Data (C006)

redmcsb_evidence.citation: M045_HEALTH_MULTIPLIER(sensor) = ((sensor)->Local.Multiple & 0x000F) — bits 0-3 of Local.Multiple field

C006 generator: L0612_ui_CreatureCount = Remote.Value; MASK0x0008_RANDOMIZE_GENERATED_CREATURE_COUNT in Remote.Value; if HealthMultiplier==0 use G0269_ps_CurrentMap->C.Difficulty; F0185_GROUP_GetGenerated(M040_DATA(sensor), HealthMultiplier, CreatureCount, ...)
MASK0x0008_RANDOMIZE_GENERATED_CREATURE_COUNT, MASK0x0007_GENERATED_CREATURE_COUNT
F0185_GROUP_GetGenerated: creature type from M040_DATA(sensor), health multiplier applied, count, direction, map position

categories.notes: Generator position as sensor (map, x, y, cell). Creature type = M040_DATA(sensor). HM = bits 0-3 of Local.Multiple (M045_HEALTH_MULTIPLIER). LEM = bits 4-10 of Local.Multiple. Spawn timing = Remote.Value (ticks) with MASK0x0008 randomization flag. Formula: health = base_health*(HM/8), xp = base_xp*LEM.

categories.name: Champion Records in Dungeon

redmcsb_evidence.citation: F0280_CHAMPION_AddCandidateChampionToParty(L0758_ui_SensorData) — C003/C008 sensor triggers champion add using sensor data as champion type index
C009_SENSOR_FLOOR_VERSION_CHECKER — version validation sensor triggered by F0276
extern void F0280_CHAMPION_AddCandidateChampionToParty

categories.notes: Champions stored as sensors (C003/C008) that trigger F0280_AddCandidateChampionToParty. Starting stats in sensor data field (M040_DATA). No separate champion record structure — dungeon contains trigger; stats from static templates.

categories.name: Text/String Data

redmcsb_evidence.citation: F0299_TEXT_DecodeTextString: decodes text from dungeon data using G0257_aac_Graphic559_InscriptionEscapeReplacementStrings
TEXTSTRING struct: { THING Next, Type_Data (Visible, Unreferenced, TextDataWordOffset) }
TEXTSTRING L0304_s_TextString = ((TEXTSTRING*)G0284_apuc_ThingData[C02_THING_TYPE_TEXTSTRING])[M013_INDEX(P0299_T_Thing)]
Text strings on wall squares displayed as inscriptions at G0265_i_CurrentMapInscriptionWallOrnamentIndex

categories.notes: Dungeon name in file header (decompressed). Object names from GRAPHICS.DAT string tables. Inscriptions as C02_THING_TYPE_TEXTSTRING on wall squares. Text encoding: word-aligned with G0257 escape replacement strings. TextDataWordOffset points into dungeon's text data word array.

categories.name: Endianness and Checksum
categories.implementation: dm1_v1_dungeon_loader_pc34_compat.c — all memcpy for multi-byte reads

redmcsb_evidence.citation: COMPRESSED_DUNGEON_HEADER: little-endian fields (Signature, DecompressedByteCount as long, DungeonID as uint16). DUNGEON_HEADER: OrnamentRandomSeed(uint16), RawMapDataByteCount(uint16), MapCount(uint8), TextDataWordCount(uint16), InitialPartyLocation(uint16), SquareFirstThingCount(uint16), ThingCount[16](uint16)
parse_header(): memcpy for all multi-byte fields — explicit little-endian reads matching PC 3.4 binary layout
F0170_DUNGEON_GetRandomOrnamentOrdinal: uses G0278_ps_DungeonHeader->OrnamentRandomSeed in pseudo-random formula

categories.notes: PC 3.4 = little-endian. No per-file checksum in DM1 DUNGEON.DAT — decompression validation only (checksums are in SAVE headers). F0455 validates via signature (0x8104). OrnamentRandomSeed seeds F0170 random ornament assignment.

summary.dmweb_free_fr_note: dmweb.free.fr/node/1444 unreachable during audit. All format knowledge derived from ReDMCSB DUNGEON.C, DEFS.H, DECOMPDU.C, MOVESENS.C, TIMELINE.C. The COMPRESSED_DUNGEON_HEADER at DEFS.H:984-998 provides definitive file format definition matching PC 3.4 binary layout.
summary.audit_method: Manual source inspection of ReDMCSB source files. Each category has at least one ReDMCSB line citation. No code modifications.
